changes.value:
**File:** `kanban-app/ui/src/components/fields/editors/multi-select-editor.tsx:53`

```ts
const isComputedTags = field.type.kind === "computed" && field.type.derive === "parse-body-tags";
```

Hardcodes detection of computed tag fields to determine target entity type, commit format, prefix, and display field. This info should come from the field definition — computed fields that are editable should declare their target entity type the same way reference fields do.
